nasb.text: The inner sanctuary was twenty cubits in length, twenty cubits in width, and twenty cubits in height, and he overlaid it with pure gold. He also overlaid the altar with cedar.

esv.text: The inner sanctuary was twenty cubits long, twenty cubits wide, and twenty cubits high, and he overlaid it with pure gold. He also overlaid an altar of cedar.

cnv.text: 內殿長九公尺，寬九公尺，高九公尺；內部都貼上精金，用香柏木做的壇也貼上精金。

ccb.text: 至圣所长、宽和高都是九米，里面全贴上纯金，香柏木造的祭坛也包上纯金。
